title: Clear the Feast Table
description: Help reset the family table after a meal.
family_note: A grown-up can help decide where dishes and wipes belong.

title: Laundry Squire Sort
description: Sort clean socks or fold a small stack of clothes.
family_note: Choose a small pile so the quest stays achievable.

title: Kind Beast Companion
description: Refresh a pet bowl with a grown-up nearby.
family_note: Keep pet-care safety rules in the real world first.

title: Book Nook Reset
description: Return books, comics, or magazines to a cozy reading spot.
family_note: Let the child choose one favorite book to display.

title: Entryway Ranger Patrol
description: Line up shoes, hang a coat, or clear one path near the door.
family_note: Focus on making the next family outing smoother.

title: Plant Apprentice Check
description: Check one plant and water it only if a grown-up says it is ready.
family_note: This quest teaches observation before action.
